response.justification: Bogdan brings genuinely relevant experience for an AI-native environment — his current role involves building MCP code generators and agentic workflow tooling, and he has real high-throughput systems experience from Sociomantic (microservices handling millions of requests per second with low-latency async I/O). However, Python — a must-have — is entirely absent from his resume and skills list, his high-throughput work is several years old and in DLang rather than the required stack, and the resume shows strong senior IC craftsmanship but little evidence of staff-level technical strategy, cross-functional stakeholder leadership, or operational/on-call ownership at scale.
strengths: Hands-on AI-agent infrastructure work in current role: MCP code generators and frameworks for agentic workflows
Real high-throughput, low-latency distributed systems experience (millions of HTTP requests/sec at Sociomantic/Dunnhumby)
Strong TypeScript/Node.js depth plus broad polyglot range and a solid testing/craftsmanship culture (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development)
concerns: No Python experience listed anywhere — a stated must-have for the role
Little demonstrated staff-scope technical strategy or cross-functional stakeholder management; career reads as strong senior IC work
Most relevant distributed-systems experience is dated (2018-2020) and in DLang; no explicit incident-response or on-call experience
